flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Saint Paul College are 15% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($38.4k vs $45.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Paul College fell 43% between 2006 and 2009 (43.2% → 24.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Saint Paul College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (32.2% vs 42.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Paul College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
